subject: v5.0.1
body: ## [5.0.1](https://github.com/algolia/react-instantsearch/compare/v5.0.0...v5.0.1) (2018-03-12) ### Bug Fixes * **connectInfiniteHits:** always provide an array for hits ([algolia/react-instantsearch#1064](https://github.com/algolia/react-instantsearch/issues/1064)) ([5208387](https://github.com/algolia/react-instantsearch/commit/5208387))
